headline: Iran Wars Fuels RTX Growth Story as Defense Demand Rockets Higher
summary: RTX Corp (NYSE:RTX) reports its first-quarter 2026 results on Tuesday, April 21, prior to market open. With the Iran War now driving a surge in missile demand and a $268 billion backlog in hand, this quarter is a direct test of whether RTX can convert geopolitical urgency into accelerating earnings. Momentum Backed by a Record ... Iran Wars Fuels RTX Growth Story as Defense Demand Rockets Higher

headline: Better Defense Stock: Lockheed Martin vs. RTX
summary: With global tensions rising, rising defense spending should provide a strong tailwind for these two companies.

headline: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
summary: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.
